preferredDeck: YouTube now completes authenticated background capture and closes its hidden session cleanly
editorialGuidance: Keep the tone concise, professional, and specific.
Lead with user-facing outcomes, shipping milestones, trust wins, and installability improvements.
Demote internal cleanup unless it clearly changes the shipped product.
pinnedHighlights: Start the normal authenticated YouTube sync from a dev build through the terminal without foreground clicks.
Require complete subscription roster evidence, recent Subscriptions media evidence, and exact installed-build identity during the soak.
editorialNotes: Do not claim historical archive crawling. The authenticated capture reconciles the complete subscription roster and the recent media rendered by the Subscriptions page.
